name: BB:UBA : Remove Mailbox Permission Succeeded
notes: Detect the successful removal of a mailbox permission.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Remove Mailbox Permission Succeeded on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
when the event QID is one of the following (101250509) Remove MailboxPermission Succeeded
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Remove Mailbox Permission Succeeded on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
